scope: Only verified links between identified people in Tynesoft photographs and game credits should appear in connections. Source-caption leads remain separate and are not public definitive identifications.

source_caption_leads.public_use: Caption attributed to Kevin Blake; do not publish as definitive left-to-right identification until independently corroborated.
Partial caption attributed to Kevin Blake; do not publish as definitive face labels until independently corroborated.

blocked_connections.reason: The image now has a source-attributed Kevin Blake caption, but no full left-to-right public caption meets the one-primary-source-or-two-independent-first-hand-testimonies threshold.
The image now has partial source-attributed Kevin Blake identifications, but most face-position pairings remain below the public definitive threshold.
